summary: FULL LAUNCH READINESS TEST COMPLETE - TemaDom Bulgarian construction/renovation platform. All critical functionality verified. Backend: 27/27 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages rendering correctly with proper navigation, authentication, theme toggle, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: HEALTH: /api/health returns status=ok
HEALTH: /api/stats returns project/company counts
HEALTH: /api/stats/live returns clients, companies, free_slots, regions
AUTH: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns token
AUTH: POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
AUTH: GET /api/auth/me returns user profile with subscription info
AUTH: Google Auth button present on login page (data-testid='google-login-btn')
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns correct prices (basic=15€, pro=35€, premium=75€, designer_3=119€)
SUBSCRIPTION: POST /api/subscriptions/activate with plan=pro works for company user
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/check-feature/telegram_notifications returns allowed=true for pro
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/check-feature/pdf_contracts returns allowed=true for pro
SUBSCRIPTION: GET /api/subscriptions/my returns subscription status
CHAT: POST /api/messages sends message with read=false
CHAT: POST /api/chat/typing sends typing indicator
CHAT: POST /api/chat/online heartbeat updates online status
CHAT: GET /api/conversations includes is_online field in other_user object
PDF: POST /api/calculator/pdf generates valid PDF
PDF: POST /api/ai-sketch/export-contract generates Bulgarian PDF with deadline_days, payment_terms, warranty_years
SCRAPING: GET /api/scrape/stores returns 21+ stores
SCRAPING: GET /api/scrape/search?q=стол&store=all returns products
PROJECTS: GET /api/projects returns project listings
COMPANIES: GET /api/companies returns 6 companies
CATEGORIES: GET /api/categories returns 20+ construction categories
REGISTRATION: Company registration requires 9-digit bulstat
REVIEWS: GET /api/reviews returns reviews
COMMUNITY: GET /api/community/posts returns posts
FRONTEND: Landing page loads with logo, hero counter, showcase before/after images
FRONTEND: 3D Дизайнер and CAD Скица buttons present and clickable
FRONTEND: Theme toggle (light/dark) works in header
FRONTEND: Navigation dropdown opens and all links work
FRONTEND: Subscriptions page shows 3 plans with correct prices
FRONTEND: Blog page renders with search and filters (49 articles)
FRONTEND: About page renders with TemaDom info
FRONTEND: Services page renders (behind auth)
FRONTEND: Companies page shows 6 companies with filters
FRONTEND: Calculator page accessible after login
FRONTEND: Chat page (/messages) accessible after login
MOBILE: Landing page renders at 375px without overlapping
MOBILE: Mobile menu opens with live stats counter
critical_code_review_comments: Blog page is frontend-only (static content from /data files) - no backend API needed
seed_data_creation: Test messages created during chat testing (prefixed with TEST_LAUNCH_MSG_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FULL LAUNCH READINESS TEST PASSED. All critical features working: Auth (email + Google), Subscriptions (plans with correct prices), Chat (messaging, typing, online status), PDF generation (calculator + contract), Product scraping (21+ stores), Projects/Companies/Categories APIs, Blog (frontend-only), Community. Mobile responsive. Theme toggle works. designer_3 price correctly at 119 EUR. Contract PDF supports deadline_days, payment_terms, warranty_years fields with Bulgarian Cyrillic via DejaVu font.

mocked_apis.stripe: Stripe payments are in test mode (always succeed without real charges)
